questionHtml: Suggest why the existence of salts containing an ion with this formula could be predicted. Refer to section 6 of the data booklet.
markschemeHtml:
same group as Mn «which forms MnO4-»
OR
in group 7/has 7 valence electrons, so its «highest» oxidation state is +7    [✔]
